title: Command
description: Command JSON sent by the Benchmark_Harness to a Runner on stdin. Exactly one object per process invocation. Derived from design.md (Runner CLI Contract / Data Models). The same shape is consumed by both the Go_Runner and the Java_Runner so the harness treats them identically.

command.description: Verb for the invocation. Currently only 'run'.

warmupIterations.description: Warm_Up_Iteration count run before recorded samples (Req 8.6); steady/soak require >= 1 (Req 17.1).

keySetPath.description: Path to the shared Key_Set (typically on tmpfs).

keySetChecksum.description: Reference checksum the Runner must confirm for the Key_Set (Req 4.5, 4.6).

corpusPath.description: Path to the scenario Test_Corpus directory.

corpusChecksum.description: Reference checksum the Runner must confirm for the Test_Corpus (Req 4.5, 4.6).

outputDir.description: Directory where the Runner writes ciphertext / decrypted output for this run.

operation.description: Operation to perform. 'roundtrip' = encrypt then decrypt with byte-for-byte verification (Req 5.1).

outputEncoding.description: OpenPGP output encoding. Must be identical for all Runners within a Scenario so ciphertext sizes and interop are comparable (Req 4.7).

checksum.description: Checksum string in the form 'sha256:<64 hex chars>'.
